AiEvaluationDefinition.description: Verifies the Product Advisor calls the deterministic strategy engine and presents a recommendation with a discount.
AiEvaluationDefinition.name: Product_Advisor_Test

expectation.expectedValue: The agent builds a recommendation, naming a primary coffee and a discount percent.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Build a chat recommendation for shopper jane.doe@example.com.

expectation.expectedValue: The agent profiles the buyer and returns a buy-again coffee plus a complementary item with a discount.
expectation.name: bot_response_rating

inputs.utterance: Recommend products for the post_purchase channel for shopper jane.doe@example.com.
